competitors.name: OpenAI
competitors.why_competitor: Direct competitor in LLM development and AI assistant products (ChatGPT/GPT-4 vs Claude), both offer API access and consumer-facing AI assistants, compete for same enterprise and developer customers

competitors.name: Google DeepMind
competitors.why_competitor: Develops competing LLMs (Gemini/Bard) and AI assistants, strong AI safety research focus, competes in both research publications and commercial AI products market

competitors.name: Microsoft
competitors.why_competitor: Major player in enterprise AI through Azure OpenAI Service and Copilot products, competes for enterprise AI assistant market, significant investment in competing AI technologies

competitors.name: Meta AI
competitors.why_competitor: Develops open-source LLMs (Llama series) that compete with commercial models, conducts AI safety research, offers alternative approach to AI deployment that could reduce demand for proprietary APIs

competitors.name: Cohere
competitors.why_competitor: Direct competitor in enterprise LLM API market, similar business model focusing on providing LLMs to businesses, competes for same developer and enterprise customer base
